decision_notes: No explicit relation-label map was available in PharmKG-8k files; relation T is selected as a therapeutic association proxy, not clinical indication.
Preliminary type map is task-specific: T heads are Drug/Chemical candidates and T tails are Disease queries.

do_not_call_it: confirmed treatment label without explicit relation-label map

day4_split_policy_recommendation.preferred: Use official PharmKG-8k split as base, select relation T triples, then apply Setting-A-style coverage filtering/subsampling with seed 2025.
coverage_rule: valid/test T-head drug must appear in train T heads
valid/test T-tail disease must appear in train T tails
no valid/test target triples included in train_enriched.tsv

relations.support_relation_policy: For Day 4, retain target train triples plus support relation candidates in train_enriched.tsv. Do not include valid/test T target triples.

prompt_template_recommendation.head_prediction_question: What drug is therapeutically associated with {disease}?
prompt_template_recommendation.biomedical_instruction: You are a biomedical scientist. The task is to predict the answer based on the given question, and you only need to answer one entity. The answer must be in (candidate list).
